message:
fix(record): symbolic obligation expected_symbol tracking prevents cross-symbol fulfillment

SymbolicObligation now tracks expected_symbol: Option<SymbolId>
set at construction time.  Single-symbol obligations (new_send_symbol)
record the exact expected symbol; batch obligations (new_send,
new_recv, new_ack) set it to None.

- validate_fulfilled_symbol() checks both object_id and, when
  expected_symbol is Some, full symbol identity match.
- fulfill_one() calls validate_fulfilled_symbol().
- fulfill_many() asserts expected_symbol.is_none(), preventing
  accidental use of the batch path on single-symbol obligations.

Regression test: send_symbol_obligation_rejects_wrong_symbol_progress
verifies that fulfilling with a symbol that has the correct object_id
but wrong generation/sequence panics with 'fulfilled symbol mismatch'.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
